spec_match.rationale: Exceptional playground enabling deep visual inspection of focusgroup attributes, axis combinations, and wrapping conditions.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding layout containing input select inputs, interactive render boxes, live events logger, and custom copy blocks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly displays how focusgroup attributes dictate computed tabindex profiles.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers various configurations from small lists to dense grid shapes.

references.rationale: The see also section now includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5637601087193088 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Clean monospace structure, border cards, and bright focus outline styling.

summary: The api-console is a top-tier playground mapping focusgroup configurations dynamically and now satisfies the required ChromeStatus reference invariant.
